summary: Dynamic Page Builder P1 testing completed successfully. All features verified: Admin login, Content Builder component library with 14 real menu components, drawer forms, canvas selected-state showing Row/Column/Component info, drag-drop elements with draggable=true attribute, and backend listing hardening validations (_validate_listing_runtime_guard_or_400).

minor.issue: Returns 403 feature_disabled (expected behavior per design - fallback to dealer config)

critical_code_review_comments: LayoutRenderer resolveRenderer function correctly implements wildcard pattern matching for menu.snapshot.* keys
Backend listing hardening validates: single default component, width breakpoints (desktop/tablet/mobile), allowed ad placements, and props whitelist per component type
Component library correctly fetches menu data from fallback sources (/api/admin/dealer-portal/config, /api/menu/top-items) when /api/admin/menu-items returns 403

success_rate.backend: 100% (curl tests passed: menu endpoints, listing hardening validations, layout metrics)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test page 1eeb35ab-e868-4085-b014-5e8f22ae49d5 for listing hardening tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic Page Builder P1 complete. Content Builder at /admin/site-design/content-builder fully functional. Component library shows 14 menu.snapshot.* items from dealer config fallback. Canvas selected-state, drawer forms, and drag-drop UI all working. Backend listing hardening rules verified.

evidence: admin@platform.com / Admin123! credentials work via /admin/login route
Regular /login route correctly redirects admin users to use admin login

ui_elements: admin-content-builder-library - component library with 14 menu.snapshot items

evidence: Formları Aç button opens Sheet component from right side
Layout Page Form visible with page_type, country, module, category_id fields
Kategori Binding Form visible with category search, tree select, and action buttons

Shows 'Seçili: Row 1 • Column 1 • home.default-content' when component clicked
Components can be dragged from library to canvas columns
resolveRenderer function in LayoutRenderer.js handles wildcard patterns ending with *
menu.snapshot.* pattern registered in HomePageRefreshed.js and SearchPage.js
MenuSnapshotBlock component renders menu data correctly

validation_rules_tested: listing_create_default_component_must_be_exactly_one - Rejects payloads without exactly one default component
listing_create_component_props_not_allowed - Rejects non-whitelisted props per component type
